task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the first facility record for AquaPure North Plant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a facility record in CAMEO Data Manager named 'AquaPure North Plant' with the address '100 River Road, Springfield, IL 62702'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the second facility record for AquaPure South Plant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a facility record in CAMEO Data Manager named 'AquaPure South Plant' with the address '4500 Industrial Way, Springfield, IL 62703'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the contact record for Elena Rodriguez with all required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a contact record for 'Elena Rodriguez' with Title 'Regional Safety Director', Organization 'AquaPure Systems', Work Phone '217-555-0199', and 24-Hour Phone '800-555-9988'.

task_completion.description: Verify Elena Rodriguez is linked to AquaPure North Plant as a Title III Emergency Contact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the AquaPure North Plant record show Elena Rodriguez assigned in the contacts section with the role/type 'Title III Emergency Contact'.

task_completion.description: Verify Elena Rodriguez is linked to AquaPure South Plant as a Title III Emergency Contact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the AquaPure South Plant record show Elena Rodriguez assigned in the contacts section with the role/type 'Title III Emergency Contact'.

task_completion.description: Verify that only a single contact record was created and shared, rather than duplicated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the global Contacts list/module in CAMEO Data Manager show exactly ONE entry for 'Elena Rodriguez', confirming the same record was linked to both facilities.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window and its internal forms/modules are clearly visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data entry is seen happening through the application's UI forms, not via PowerShell, Command Prompt, or database injection scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the final records exist within the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The completed facility and contact records are displayed inside the CAMEO Data Manager lists or record views, not in a text editor, spreadsheet, or mock application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Software: CAMEO Data Manager. Facility 1: 'AquaPure North Plant' at '100 River Road, Springfield, IL 62702'. Facility 2: 'AquaPure South Plant' at '4500 Industrial Way, Springfield, IL 62703'. Contact: 'Elena Rodriguez', 'Regional Safety Director', 'AquaPure Systems'. Phones: Work '217-555-0199', 24-Hour '800-555-9988'. Role: 'Title III Emergency Contact'. Crucial constraint: There must be exactly ONE contact record for Elena Rodriguez in the system's global contact list, which is linked to both facilities, rather than two separate identical contact records.
